name: Turing-NLG (17B)
archDisplay: Dense Transformer decoder (78 layers, hidden size 4256, 28 attention heads)
note: At launch the largest Transformer LM (17B); showcased DeepSpeed/ZeRO; research-only, weights never released.

results.notes: Next-word prediction accuracy; new SOTA at the time (prior best 66.51%)

verificationNotes: Confirmed real historical model via Microsoft Research blog (fetched directly): released 2020-02-13, 17B params, 78 Transformer layers / hidden size 4256 / 28 attention heads, LAMBADA 67.98% and WikiText-103 perplexity 10.21 both literally confirmed on the page. Weights confirmed never released publicly (only a private academic demo was offered). No changes to record.
